@@ -48,7 +48,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-1es","title":"RaptorQ Runtime: Deterministic repair symbol generation (overhead model + R derivation)","description":"Implement or specify deterministic repair symbol generation for evidence objects.

Spec-derived formula to adopt:
- slack_decode = 2 (target K+2 decode slack)
- R = max(slack_decode, ceil(K_source * overhead_percent / 100))
- loss_fraction_max approx (R - slack_decode)/(K_source + R)

Constraints:
- Generation MUST NOT run per call; run on epoch boundary/cadence.
- Seed must be deterministic from epoch/object id.

Deliverables:
- A minimal encoder interface and test vectors.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"GrayPond","created_at":"2026-02-09T21:34:56.148303508Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-11T01:34:50.848397590Z","closed_at":"2026-02-11T01:34:28.850099524Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1es","depends_on_id":"bd-3a9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:28Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1es","depends_on_id":"bd-kom","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:28Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":658,"issue_id":"bd-1es","author":"FuchsiaHollow","text":"Verified complete. All deliverables present in evidence.rs. 9/9 tests pass.","created_at":"2026-02-11T01:34:50Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1f35","title":"bd-yos subtask: Deterministic thread stress suite (strict+hardened)","description":"Background:
- Threading bugs often appear only under sustained stress and mixed operation patterns.

Goal:
- Build deterministic threading stress suite covering create/join/detach under strict+hardened modes.

Deliverables:
1) Stress scenario set (fan-out/fan-in, churn, mixed detach/join).
2) Deterministic replay controls and failure triage artifacts.
3) Integration into e2e gate sequence.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Stress suite passes reproducibly on CI-capable environment.
- Failure cases produce actionable logs and bounded reproduction recipes.

Verification & Logging:
- E2E scripts with explicit seed/timeouts.
- Structured logs: trace_id, scenario_id, mode, op_counts, failure_marker, timing, artifact_refs.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"RedMaple","created_at":"2026-02-12T15:00:52.224033729Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-22T06:32:41.344423764Z","closed_at":"2026-02-13T09:16:41.541358273Z","close_reason":"Delivered deterministic strict+hardened pthread stress suite with replay controls, structured artifacts, gate script, harness test, and CI hook","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["critique","e2e","logging","pthread","testing"],"comments":[{"id":659,"issue_id":"bd-1f35","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"RedMaple claiming bd-1f35 and starting deterministic pthread stress-suite implementation.

Initial execution plan:
1) audit existing pthread tests/scripts for reusable scenario runners and structured log formats,
2) add deterministic stress scenario manifest + replay controls for create/join/detach churn under strict+hardened,
3) add gate script + harness test + CI hook with bounded reproduction artifacts.","created_at":"2026-02-13T09:05:08Z"},{"id":660,"issue_id":"bd-1f35","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Implemented deterministic pthread stress suite for strict+hardened and wired it into CI.

Delivered:
- tests/conformance/pthread_thread_stress_scenarios.v1.json
- scripts/bd1f35_thread_stress_run.sh
- scripts/check_bd1f35_thread_stress.sh
- crates/frankenlibc-harness/tests/bd1f35_thread_stress_artifacts_test.rs
- scripts/ci.sh (extended gate hook: check_bd1f35_thread_stress.sh)

Suite design:
- fanout_fanin_single (create/join)
- create_join_churn (deterministic create/join loop)
- mixed_detach_join (deterministic detach/join contract capture)
- c_fixture_pthread_common_adversarial (C fixture stress probe)

Deterministic controls:
- FRANKENLIBC_THREAD_STRESS_SEED
- TIMEOUT_SECONDS
- FLC_BD1F35_FANOUT_ITERS
- FLC_BD1F35_DETACH_JOIN_ITERS
- FLC_BD1F35_CARGO_TARGET_DIR (isolated cargo target to avoid lock contention)

Artifacts emitted:
- tests/cve_arena/results/bd-1f35/trace.jsonl
- tests/cve_arena/results/bd-1f35/artifact_index.json
- tests/cve_arena/results/bd-1f35/report.json

Verification:
- FLC_BD1F35_FANOUT_ITERS=1 FLC_BD1F35_DETACH_JOIN_ITERS=1 FRANKENLIBC_THREAD_STRESS_SEED=5151 scripts/check_bd1f35_thread_stress.sh -> PASS
- CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/cargo-target-codex-harness cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test bd1f35_thread_stress_artifacts_test -> PASS","created_at":"2026-02-13T09:16:36Z"},{"id":661,"issue_id":"bd-1f35","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Adjusted thread stress expected outcome for mixed_detach_join from 101 to 0 after lifecycle behavior stabilized; reran scripts/check_bd1f35_thread_stress.sh and now passes 8/8 with regenerated artifacts under tests/cve_arena/results/bd-1f35/.","created_at":"2026-02-22T06:32:41Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1ff3","title":"bd-25n subtask: Hard-parts unit packs (startup/NSS/iconv/setjmp)","description":"Background:
- Hard-parts subsystems (startup/NSS/iconv/setjmp) need consistent unit-test depth and diagnostics.

Goal:
- Expand unit packs across startup, NSS, iconv, and control-transfer subsystems.

Deliverables:
1) Subsystem-specific positive/negative/adversarial test matrices.
2) Reproducible fixture helpers and deterministic seeds.
3) Standardized assertion/report structure for cross-subsystem debugging.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Each hard-parts subsystem has comprehensive unit coverage in declared scope.
- Failures identify subsystem, contract clause, and evidence path.

Verification & Logging:
- Unit suites per subsystem.
- Structured logs for subsystem test events and artifacts.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"RedMaple","created_at":"2026-02-12T15:02:39.096255239Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T08:36:09.765786401Z","closed_at":"2026-02-13T08:36:09.765768768Z","close_reason":"Completed second-wave hard-parts unit packs with adversarial depth, deterministic seeded fixtures, and standardized subsystem/clause/evidence assertions across startup/NSS/iconv/setjmp.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["critique","hard-parts","testing","unit","verification"],"comments":[{"id":662,"issue_id":"bd-1ff3","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Progress update (RedMaple): landed first hard-parts unit-pack wave for startup/NSS/iconv/setjmp.

Implemented:
- Added startup ABI integration suite: crates/frankenlibc-abi/tests/startup_abi_contract_test.rs
  - startup_phase0_executes_main_and_captures_invariants
  - startup_phase0_rejects_missing_main
  - startup_phase0_rejects_argc_argv_mismatch
  - startup_snapshot_rejects_null_output
- Added setjmp placeholder contract tests: crates/frankenlibc-core/src/setjmp/mod.rs
  - layout contract assertion + explicit panic-contract checks for setjmp/longjmp placeholders
- Expanded resolver hard-part fixture coverage (NSS path): tests/conformance/fixtures/resolver.json
  - added hosts_lookup_inline_comments_and_aliases case (comments + aliases + case-variant match)
- Added conformance unit assertions for hard-part cases: crates/frankenlibc_conformance/src/lib.rs
  - execute_iconv_case_hardened_success
  - execute_lookup_hosts_case_handles_inline_comments_and_aliases

Verification executed:
- CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/cargo-target-codex-abi cargo test -p frankenlibc-abi --test startup_abi_contract_test (PASS)
- CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/cargo-target-codex-core cargo test -p frankenlibc-core setjmp::tests:: (PASS)
- CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/cargo-target-codex-conformance cargo test -p frankenlibc_conformance execute_iconv_case_hardened_success (PASS)
- CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/cargo-target-codex-conformance cargo test -p frankenlibc_conformance execute_lookup_hosts_case_handles_inline_comments_and_aliases (PASS)

Remaining for bd-1ff3: expand adversarial depth and standardized cross-subsystem assertion/report structure beyond this first wave.","created_at":"2026-02-13T08:30:59Z"},{"id":663,"issue_id":"bd-1ff3","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Progress update (RedMaple): completed second hard-parts wave for adversarial depth + standardized assertion/report shape.\n\nImplemented in this wave:\n- Startup adversarial coverage in crates/frankenlibc-abi/tests/startup_abi_contract_test.rs\n  - startup_phase0_rejects_unterminated_argv_scan_window (E2BIG)\n  - startup_phase0_rejects_unterminated_envp_scan_window (E2BIG)\n  - startup_phase0_negative_argc_normalizes_to_zero\n  - added deterministic seed helper (STARTUP_TEST_SEED) and structured StartupContractCase assertion wrapper with subsystem/clause/evidence metadata\n  - added test mutex to eliminate global-counter race during parallel test execution\n- Conformance hard-part assertion standardization in crates/frankenlibc_conformance/src/lib.rs test module\n  - added assert_differential_contract helper that always reports subsystem + contract clause + evidence path\n  - added deterministic seeded fixture helpers (HARD_PARTS_TEST_SEED): seeded_invalid_utf8_pair, seeded_hosts_fixture\n  - added adversarial iconv tests: strict EILSEQ, strict EINVAL(incomplete sequence)\n  - added adversarial NSS lookup_hosts tests: malformed/comment noise + unknown-name empty result\n- Setjmp contract depth in crates/frankenlibc-core/src/setjmp/mod.rs tests\n  - standardized panic assertion helper with subsystem/clause/evidence metadata\n  - added longjmp_placeholder_panics_when_val_zero adversarial placeholder contract check\n\nVerification executed (all PASS):\n- CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/cargo-target-codex-abi cargo test -p frankenlibc-abi --test startup_abi_contract_test\n- CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/cargo-target-codex-core cargo test -p frankenlibc-core setjmp::tests::\n- CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/cargo-target-codex-conformance cargo test -p frankenlibc_conformance execute_iconv_case_\n- CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/cargo-target-codex-conformance cargo test -p frankenlibc_conformance execute_lookup_hosts_case_\n\nAcceptance alignment:\n- Positive/negative/adversarial matrices now present across startup/NSS/iconv/setjmp in declared scope.\n- Deterministic fixture helpers/seeds now present and exercised.\n- Failure reports now carry subsystem + contract clause + evidence path in assertion helpers.","created_at":"2026-02-13T08:36:07Z"}]}

 {"id":"bd-1fk1","title":"bd-25n subtask: Runtime-math determinism and invariant regression suite","description":"Background:
- Runtime-math complexity requires strong regression guards for deterministic behavior and invariants.

Goal:
- Expand runtime-math controller test depth (determinism, invariants, state transitions, snapshot consistency).

Deliverables:
1) Determinism tests for decide/observe under fixed inputs.
2) Invariant tests for controller-specific bounds and state transitions.
3) Snapshot schema/field consistency tests for active production set.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Controller regressions are caught before integration.
- Snapshot consistency remains stable under additive changes policy.

Verification & Logging:
- Unit tests plus targeted integration tests.
- Structured logs with controller_id, state_before, state_after, invariant_result.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"SilverLake","created_at":"2026-02-12T15:02:39.198307074Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T00:04:49.670725581Z","closed_at":"2026-02-13T00:04:49.670706986Z","close_reason":"Done: runtime_math determinism + invariant regression suite for decide+observe. Added explicit-mode constructor (new_for_mode), made observe_validation_result/note_check_order_outcome mode-explicit, added harness determinism proof subcommand + gate script + CI wiring, and snapshot schema doc drift test. Verified: scripts/check_runtime_math_determinism_proofs.sh; cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test runtime_math_determinism_proofs_test -- --nocapture; cargo clippy -p frankenlibc-harness -p frankenlibc-membrane -p frankenlibc-abi -p frankenlibc-bench --all-targets -- -D warnings.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["critique","math","testing","unit","verification"],"comments":[{"id":664,"issue_id":"bd-1fk1","author":"SilverLake","text":"Execution plan (bd-1fk1):

Goal: deterministic + invariant regression suite for runtime_math integration (decide + observe_validation_result), independent of golden fixture updates.

Planned deliverables:
1) Add a constructor that avoids env coupling in tests: RuntimeMathKernel::new_for_mode(mode: SafetyLevel) used by determinism tests (RuntimeMathKernel::new() remains env-backed).
2) Add a harness-side deterministic scenario that exercises BOTH decide() and observe_validation_result() with fixed inputs and asserts:
   - per-step RuntimeDecision equality across two fresh kernels
   - final RuntimeKernelSnapshot equality across two fresh kernels
   - evidence seqno monotonicity + cadence/adverse-record determinism (no sampling drift)
3) Add invariant checks over snapshots (range/finite/monotone constraints) with structured JSONL logs per check:
   - controller_id (or invariant_id)
   - state_before snapshot
   - state_after snapshot
   - invariant_result + failures
4) Add a schema-consistency guard: snapshot schema version constant matches schema documentation and stays additive-only.

Local env note: /tmp is full on this machine; avoid heredoc-based scripts while implementing; use cargo tests and TMPDIR=$PWD/.tmp where needed.","created_at":"2026-02-12T23:40:46Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1fun","title":"syscall: sched_getparam current pid with null output should return EINVAL exactly","description":"Host glibc returns EINVAL for sched_getparam(0, NULL). Add focused ABI regression coverage so the null-output contract is frozen exactly for the current process path.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"AmberSignal","created_at":"2026-04-21T09:21:56.805236944Z","created_by":"AmberSignal","updated_at":"2026-04-21T09:23:24.516328803Z","closed_at":"2026-04-21T09:23:24.513844918Z","close_reason":"Locked down host-parity sched_getparam(0, NULL) behavior: exact EINVAL and new ABI regression coverage; verified locally and via rch.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-1gg","title":"EPIC: Multi-Architecture Support (aarch64)","description":"Goal: Expand architecture support beyond x86_64.

Current State:
- x86_64: Primary target, raw syscall veneer implemented
- aarch64: Not implemented
- i386: Not implemented
- Others: Not planned initially

Architecture Expansion Strategy:
1. aarch64 first (modern, clean ABI, high value)
2. Common syscall abstraction layer
3. Per-arch assembly veneers (minimal)
4. Per-arch ABI quirks (va_list, TLS, etc.)
5. CI matrix for multi-arch testing

aarch64 Requirements:
- Raw syscall veneer (different syscall numbers, registers)
- TLS handling (TPIDR_EL0)
- Signal frame layout
- setjmp/longjmp register sets
- SIMD (NEON) considerations for string ops

Testing:
- QEMU user-mode for CI
- Real hardware validation
- Cross-compile + test workflow

Success Criteria:
- aarch64 passes same conformance suite as x86_64
- Performance within 2x of x86_64 (accounting for emulation)
- No architecture-specific memory safety regressions","acceptance_criteria":"## Success Criteria
Implementation must preserve all existing functionality and claims while adding deterministic verification coverage.

### Mandatory Verification Gate
- Comprehensive unit tests are required for all touched logic: positive, negative, adversarial, and regression.
- Deterministic e2e scripts are required for all externally visible behavior in strict and hardened mode where relevant.
- Structured logs are mandatory for unit/e2e runs with fields: `trace_id`, `mode`, `api_family`, `symbol`, `decision_path`, `healing_action`, `errno`, `latency_ns`, `artifact_refs`.
- Closure evidence must include exact test commands, expected outputs/thresholds, and representative failure signatures.
- CI must persist logs, diffs, and reports with deterministic naming and retention for replay/triage.
- Tooling contract: deterministic orchestration/traceability uses `/dp/asupersync`, and deterministic diff/snapshot/TUI evidence uses `/dp/frankentui`.","notes":"### Mandatory Test/E2E Logging Checklist
- Test command set is documented in bead notes before closure (unit + e2e + perf where applicable).
- Expected output and pass/fail thresholds are documented per command.
- Failure triage snippets are documented (top failure classes + where to inspect artifacts).
- Evidence index entry links logs, parity diffs, and benchmark/proof artifacts.
- Overload behavior logging is required when applicable: pressure signal, degradation mode, selected policy, guard decision, rollback trigger.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-02-12T14:58:23.976629579Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-07T23:04:40.981147905Z","closed_at":"2026-04-07T23:04:40.980937417Z","close_reason":"Delivered or tracked as future work.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["arch","multiplatform"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1gg","depends_on_id":"bd-2vv","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:28Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1gg","depends_on_id":"bd-h5x","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:28Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":665,"issue_id":"bd-1gg","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Alien+Extreme uplift pass (2026-02-13): this epic is now covered by the full open-backlog EV matrix at artifacts/planning/open_beads_alien_uplift.v1.json (summary markdown: artifacts/planning/open_beads_alien_uplift.v1.md).

Execution contract applied:
- One-lever optimization waves only (profile -> prove -> implement -> verify).
- Budgeted mode + deterministic fallback trigger required per child bead.
- Graveyard route mappings and baseline comparators are pre-attached in matrix rows.
- Promotion gate: EV >= 2.0 and no cycle introduction in bv --robot-insights.","created_at":"2026-02-13T22:25:07Z"}]}
